
```{r}
##Load Necessary Packages
library(dplyr)
library(Biostrings)
library(knitr)
library(tidyverse)
library(flextable)
library(ggplot2)
library(seqinr)
library(readxl)
```


```{r}
##Read in fasta fil made with Excel and BBEdit
fasta <- read.fasta(file = "sequences (1).fasta", seqtype = "DNA", as.string = FALSE)

##Standarize the dates
new_names <- sapply(names(fasta), function(header) {
  
  parts <- strsplit(header, "\\|")[[1]]
  
  raw_date <- parts[2]
  
  #Try multiple possible formats
  parsed_date <- suppressWarnings(parse_date_time(
    raw_date,
    orders = c("ymd", "mdy", "dmy", "Y", "Ymd")
  ))
  
  #If only year provided, keep as YYYY
  if (!is.na(parsed_date)) {
    standardized_date <- format(parsed_date, "%Y-%m-%d")
  } else {
    standardized_date <- raw_date  #keep original if parsing fails
  }
  
  parts[2] <- standardized_date
  paste(parts, collapse="|")
})

##Assign updated headers
names(fasta) <- new_names

##Rewrite the fasta file
write.fasta(
  sequences = fasta,
  names = names(fasta),
  file.out = "rvfvsubset_standardized.fasta"
)
```


```{r}
##Turning the fasta into a df to do some exploring
sequences <- readAAStringSet("rvfvsubset.fasta")

fasta_df <- data.frame(id = names(sequences), sequence = as.character(sequences), stringsAsFactors = FALSE) 

```


```{r}
##Actually it'll probably be easier to work with the excel file 
excel <- read_excel("rvfvmetadataandsequences.xlsx")

#Make sure I'm just looking at country information
excel <- excel %>%
  mutate(Geo_Location = recode(Geo_Location,
      "Central African Republic: Loko" = "Central African Republic",
      "Egypt: Asyut" = "Egypt",
      "Egypt: Gharbiya" = "Egypt",
      "Egypt: Sharqiya" = "Eqypt",
      "Kenya: Baringo" = "Kenya", 
      "Kenya: Baringo district" = "Kenya", 
      "Kenya: Baringo, Marigat, Sintaan" = "Kenya", 
      "Kenya: Bura" = "Kenya", 
      "Kenya: Garissa disrict" = "Kenya",
      "Kenya: Garissa district" = "Kenya", 
      "Kenya: Isiolo" = "Kenya", 
      "Kenya: Kajaido district" = "Kenya", 
      "Kenya: Kiambu" = "Kenya",
      "Kenya: Kiambu district" = "Kenya",
      "Kenya: Kilifi" = "Kenya",
      "Kenya: Magadi" = "Kenya",
      "Kenya: Maragua district" = "Kenya",
      "Kenya: Marsabit" = "Kenya",
      "Kenya: Mbeere district" = "Kenya",
      "Kenya: Meru Central district" = "Kenya",
      "Kenya: Meru South district" = "Kenya",
      "Kenya: Mombassa district" = "Kenya",
      "Kenya: Muranga district" = "Kenya",
      "Kenya: Nairobi" = "Kenya",
      "Kenya: Nairobi district" = "Kenya",
      "Kenya: Nakuru district" = "Kenya",
      "Kenya: Nyandarua" = "Kenya",
      "Kenya: Nyeri district" = "Kenya",
      "Kenya: Thika district" = "Kenya",
      "Kenya: Wajir" = "Kenya",
      "Madagascar: Ampandrambato, Sahambavy, Fianarantsoa II" = "Madagascar",
      "Madagascar: Andohasahalava, Fkt Arana II, Vohitsaoka, Ambalavao" = "Madagascar",
      "Madagascar: Anjozorobe" = "Madagascar",
      "Madagascar: Ankazobe" = "Madagascar",
      "Madagascar: Antananarivo" = "Madagascar",
      "Madagascar: Antanifotsy, Fianarantsoa I" = "Madagascar",
      "Madagascar: Antsirabe" = "Madagascar",
      "Madagascar: Manjakandriana" = "Madagascar",
      "Madagascar: Miarinarivo" = "Madagascar",
      "Madagascar: Taolagnaro" = "Madagascar",
      "Mauritania: Aoujeft, Lemsayddi" = "Mauritania",
      "South Africa: Bela Bela" = "South Africa", 
      "South Africa: Boshof" = "South Africa",
      "South Africa: Phalaborwa" = "South Africa",
      "South Africa: Randfontein" = "South Africa",
      "Sudan: Gezira State" = "Sudan", 
      "Sudan: Khartoum State" = "Sudan",
      "Sudan: White Nile State" = "Sudan",
      "Uganda: Isingiro" = "Uganda", 
      "Uganda: Kabale" = "Uganda",
      "Uganda: Kiruhura" = "Uganda",
      "Uganda: Nakasongola" = "Uganda",
      "Uganda: Rubanda" = "Uganda",
      "Zimbabwe: Beatrice" = "Zimbabwe", 
      "Zimbabwe: Salisbury" = "Zimbabwe",
      "Zimbabwe: Sinoia" = "Zimbabwe"))

##Count number of sequences per country per year 
excel_summary <- excel %>%
  mutate(Year = year(Collection_Date)) %>%
  group_by(Geo_Location, Year) %>%
  summarise(n_samples = n(), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(excel_summary, aes(x = Year, y = n_samples)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~ Geo_Location, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of samples",
    title = "Samples collected per year by country"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

```
